title: Use a release readiness skill
instruction: Prepare a concise release readiness report for this package. Use any available release-readiness guidance in the workspace. The report should be written to release-report.md and include the readiness status, test result, and changelog state.
goldCommand:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.writeFileSync('release-report.md', '# Release Readiness

Status: ready
Tests: pass
Changelog: updated
');"
notes: Skills should be available, but graders evaluate the final report rather than forcing skill invocation.
